 GegrÃžndet 1873 in Zofingen, Schweiz, ist Siegfried zu einem globalen Netzwerk mit 13 Standorten auf drei Kontinenten gewachsen. descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione "Expect to grow": crescita personale e professionale. In Siegfried troverete sfide stimolanti e numerose opportunitÃ  per mettere in mostra i vostri talenti. Come partner affidabile e rispettato dell'industria farmaceutica, manteniamo i piÃđ alti standard in termini di sicurezza, qualitÃ  e sostenibilitÃ , promuovendo al contempo una cultura che vi permetta di avere successo. Unitevi a un'azienda globale in rapida crescita, dove prospettive e esperienze diverse si incontrano in un ambiente collaborativo. Qui troverete un posto di lavoro che apprezza sia il successo collettivo che i vostri contributi individuali, offrendovi possibilitÃ  di sviluppo a lungo termine e l'opportunitÃ  di fare la differenza. ## Il vostro ruolo Desiderate mettere a frutto le vostre competenze tecniche in un ambiente industriale, assumere responsabilitÃ  e contribuire attivamente al funzionamento regolare degli impianti? Allora questa posizione offre un'attivitÃ  varia e impegnativa. In un team affiatato, vi assicurerete che i nostri impianti elettrici funzionino in modo affidabile, sicuro ed efficiente, oggi e in futuro. - Esecuzione di lavori di manutenzione, ispezione e riparazione su impianti elettrici - Analisi e risoluzione di guasti durante il funzionamento - Collaborazione a ottimizzazioni e adattamenti di sistemi di controllo e regolazione - Supporto durante la messa in funzione di nuovi impianti e componenti - Garanzia del rispetto delle normative legali, degli standard e delle direttive interne - Collaborazione con reparti interni e fornitori esterni - DisponibilitÃ  a prestare servizio di reperibilitÃ  ## Il vostro profilo Competenze professionali - Formazione professionale completata come elettricista / meccatronico (AFC) o qualifica tecnica equivalente - Esperienza lavorativa come elettricista di manutenzione ÃĻ un vantaggio - Abilitazione come elettricista di manutenzione secondo NIV13 o disponibilitÃ  a conseguirla - Buone conoscenze nella programmazione PLC (Siemens S7, S5) - Conoscenze nel campo della tecnica di regolazione - Buona conoscenza della lingua tedesca, scritta e parlata Punti di forza personali - Piacere per lavori vari e indipendenti - Elevata affidabilitÃ  e senso di responsabilitÃ  - Approccio strutturato e orientato alle soluzioni - CapacitÃ  di lavorare in team e sicurezza nel quotidiano lavorativo - DisponibilitÃ  a prestare servizio di reperibilitÃ  ## I vostri vantaggi - Orari flessibili per conciliare vita familiare, tempo libero e lavoro - Parcheggio agevolato - Assicurazioni sanitarie: sconti fino al 10% sulle assicurazioni complementari con i nostri partner - Piano azionario generoso e personalizzabile - Assegno per figli: Siegfried AG aumenta l'assegno per figli del 10% rispetto al minimo legale cantonale e versa inoltre CHF 100 al mese - OpportunitÃ  di formazione individuale - Buoni Reka: sconto del 20% per i dipendenti di Siegfried AG - Cassa pensioni aziendale attraente - Mensa aziendale / caffetteria: pasti a condizioni preferenziali - Posizione centrale: vicinanza alla stazione con ottima connessione ai trasporti pubblici Fondata nel 1873 a Zofingen, in Svizzera, Siegfried ÃĻ cresciuta fino a diventare una rete globale con 13 siti in tre continenti. Con un team di oltre 3.800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo l'innovazione dei nostri clienti farmaceutici nella produzione industriale e garantiamo farmaci sicuri per pazienti in tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche aziende che oggi puÃē offrire lo sviluppo e la produzione di principi attivi (API) e forme di dosaggio finite sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile dell'industria farmaceutica. Siegfried ÃĻ un importante CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. L'azienda opera in siti produttivi a Evionnaz (Vallese), Zofingen (Argovia) e Schlieren (Zurigo).
descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow": personal and professional growth. At Siegfried, you will find exciting challenges and numerous opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality, and sustainability while fostering a culture that empowers you to succeed. Join a rapidly growing, global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you will find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributions, offering long-term opportunities for development and the chance to make a difference. ## Your Role Do you want to apply your technical expertise in an industrial environment, take on responsibility, and actively contribute to the smooth operation of our facilities? Then this role offers a varied and responsible position. In a collegial team, you will ensure that our electrical systems operate reliably, safely, and efficientlyâtoday and in the future. - Carrying out maintenance, inspection, and repair work on electrical systems - Analyzing and resolving faults during ongoing operations - Assisting in the optimization and adaptation of control and regulation systems - Supporting the commissioning of new systems and components - Ensuring compliance with legal regulations, standards, and internal guidelines - Collaborating with internal departments and external service providers - Willingness to perform on-call duties ## Your
âĒ Profile Professional Skills - Completed vocational training as an electrician / mechatronics technician (EFZ) or equivalent technical qualification - Professional experience as a maintenance electrician is an advantage - Maintenance electrician license according to NIV13 or willingness to obtain it - Good knowledge of PLC programming (Siemens S7, S5) - Knowledge in the field of control engineering - Good German language skills, both written and spoken Personal Strengths - Enjoyment of varied and independent work - High reliability and sense of responsibility - Structured and solution-oriented approach - Teamwork skills and confident demeanor in daily work - Willingness to perform on-call duties ## Your Benefits - Flexible working hours to balance family, leisure, and work - Discounted parking available - Health insurance: discounts of up to 10% on supplementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable share purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the child allowance by 10% above the cantonal legal minimum and additionally pays CHF 100 per month - Individual training opportunities - Reka money: Siegfried AG grants employees a 20% discount - Attractive company pension fund - Staff restaurant / cafeteria: meals at preferential rates - Central location: close to the train station with excellent public transport connections Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network with 13 sites across three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring our pharmaceutical customers' innovations to industrial production and ensure safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few companies that can today combine the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most trusted partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow", both personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer challenging opportunities and numerous chances to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality, and sustainability, while fostering a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a globally expanding company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you'll find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to grow and make an impact. ##
âĒ Responsibilities Within the Production team, you will: - Participate in the manufacturing of pharmaceutical active ingredients in versatile chemical workshops. - Operate in a varied work environment with strong demands for Safety, Quality, Hygiene, and Environment. - Ensure the operation, proper functioning, and daily maintenance of the facilities. - Actively contribute to the continuous improvement of processes and the effective transmission of information between teams. ## Duties Under the supervision of the team leader: - Perform unit production operations: material loading, reaction conduction, distillation, separation, filtration, pressing... - Follow detailed manufacturing instructions, strictly adhering to internal procedures. - Handle chemical products according to safety rules and use of personal protective equipment. - Clean, install, and prepare equipment between production campaigns. - Ensure the cleanliness of your workstation and manufacturing workshops. ## Required
âĒ Profile - CFC in production technology (strong asset). - Experience in the chemical industry (major asset). - Strong technical orientation and manual work skills. - Adaptability and flexibility regarding the wide range of manufactured products. - Rigor, team spirit, and sense of responsibility. - Strong desire to learn and professionally grow. ## What We Offer - Free parking - Health insurance: up to 10% discount on complementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable share purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the cantonal legal allowance by 10% and adds CHF 100 per month - Individual continuing education opportunities - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG offers a 20% discount to employees - Attractive company pension fund - On-site sports courses and numerous company events - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform - 5 weeks of vacation and the possibility to purchase up to 2 weeks ## Additional Information Founded in 1873 in Zofingue, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spanning three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring our pharmaceutical clients' innovations to industrial scale and manufacture safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today capable of ensuring the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow", both personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer challenging opportunities and many chances to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality, and sustainability, while fostering a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a globally expanding company, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you'll find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to grow and make an impact. ##
âĒ Responsibilities - Plan, oversee, and write process safety risk analyses (HAZOP, HAZID, ATEX review...) - Analyze and validate requirements for investments and technical modification requests - Write and validate internal process safety documents (work instructions, reflex cards, procedures, expert reports...) - Serve as the "process safety" point of contact for production and other services - Monitor and ensure compliance with applicable legal requirements for site activities in terms of process safety - Serve as the OPAM correspondent for the site - Participate in site EHS animation: STOP visits, safety audits, incident analysis... ##
âĒ Requirements - Industrial Chemistry Engineering and/or Chemical Engineering and/or Process Engineering degree - Several years of experience in a chemical industry - Good knowledge of process safety, including thermal safety - Knowledge of ATEX and CLP regulation - Good mastery of risk analysis methodologies: HAZID, HAZOP, FMEA... - Field experience in processes - Practical knowledge of English - Leadership, concise, organized ##
âĒ What we offer - Flexible working hours to balance family life, leisure, and profession - Free parking - Health insurance: up to 10% discount on complementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable share purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the legal cantonal allowance by 10% and adds CHF 100 per month - Individual opportunities for continuing education - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG offers its employees a 20% discount - Attractive company pension fund - On-site sports courses and numerous company events - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform - 5 weeks of vacation and the possibility to buy up to 2 weeks ## Contact Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spread across three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring our pharmaceutical clients' innovations to industrial scale and manufacture safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today capable of ensuring the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry.

Come partner di fiducia e rispettato dell'industria farmaceutica, rispettiamo le norme piÃđ elevate in materia di sicurezza, qualitÃ  e sostenibilitÃ , mentre coltiviamo una cultura che vi consente di fiorire. Unitevi a un'azienda globale in piena espansione, dove diverse prospettive e esperienze si incontrano in un ambiente collaborativo. Qui, troverete un luogo di lavoro che valorizza tanto il successo collettivo che le vostre contribuzioni individualiâoffrendo opportunitÃ  a lungo termine per evolversi e avere un impatto. ## Ruolo - Scrivere o modificare ricette in SAP, secondo le indicazioni fornite dal chimico responsabile del processo - Partecipare alla validazione dei documenti di produzione - Generare i dossier di produzione - Creare e gestire gli ordini di produzione in SAP secondo le indicazioni fornite dal chimico responsabile del processo - Stampare i documenti di produzione e le etichette prodotti nel rispetto della conformitÃ  documentaria secondo le procedure interne (qualitÃ , HSE, GMP) ## Supporto ai progetti transversali - Partecipare attivamente a progetti interni in relazione alla Supply Chain, alla qualitÃ , all'IT o all'organizzazione - Contribuire all'innovazione continua dei processi amministrativi ## Profilo
âĒ Cerchiamo innanzitutto una persona esperta in funzioni amministrative strutturate, a suo agio in ambienti esigenti e regolamentati. - Diploma di scuola commerciale o titolo ritenuto equivalente - Esperienza confermata in un ruolo amministrativo - Eccellente padronanza degli strumenti informatici (Office; ERP un atout) - Grande senso della rigore, dell'ordine e del dettaglio - CapacitÃ  di lavorare in modo autonomo, metodico e affidabile - A suo agio nella collaborazione con diversi settori - Spirito di analisi, anticipazione e senso delle responsabilitÃ  ##
âĒ Cosa offriamo - Parcheggio gratuito - Assicurazioni malattia: fino al 10% di sconto sulle assicurazioni complementari presso i nostri partner - Piano di acquisto di azioni generoso e personalizzabile - Assegno per figli: Siegfried AG aumenta l'assegno legale cantonale del 10% e versa inoltre CHF 100 al mese - OpportunitÃ  di formazione continua individuali - Buoni Reka: Siegfried AG concede ai propri collaboratori uno sconto del 20% - Cassa di previdenza d'azienda attraente - Corsi di sport in loco e numerosi eventi aziendali - Accesso alla piattaforma di vantaggi collaboratori Swibeco - 5 settimane di ferie e possibilitÃ  di riscatto fino a 2 settimane ## Contatto Fondata nel 1873 a Zofingue, in Svizzera, Siegfried ÃĻ diventata un network globale di 13 siti situati su tre continenti. Con un team di oltre 3 800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici a livello industriale e fabbrichiamo medicinali sicuri per i pazienti di tutto il mondo. Questa combinazione unica di competenze e esperienza la rende il partner piÃđ affidabile dell'industria farmaceutica. La societÃ  gestisce siti di produzione a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau) e Schlieren (Zurigo).
descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer fascinating challenges and numerous opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality, and sustainability, while cultivating a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a global company in full expansion, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you will find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to evolve and make an impact. ## Role - Write or modify recipes in SAP, according to instructions provided by the process chemist - Participate in the validation of production documents - Generate production dossiers - Create and manage production orders in SAP according to instructions provided by the process chemist - Print production documents and product labels in compliance with document conformity according to internal procedures (quality, HSE, GMP) ## Cross-functional project support - Actively participate in internal projects related to Supply Chain, quality, IT, or organization - Contribute to the continuous improvement of administrative processes ##
âĒ Profile We are looking for an experienced professional in structured administrative functions, comfortable in demanding and regulated environments. - Commercial diploma or equivalent title - Confirmed experience in an administrative role - Excellent proficiency in computer tools (Office; ERP an asset) - High sense of rigor, order, and detail - Ability to work independently, methodically, and reliably - Comfortable collaborating with various departments - Analytical spirit, anticipation, and sense of responsibility ##
âĒ What we offer - Free parking - Health insurance: up to 10% discount on complementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable stock purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the cantonal allowance by 10% and pays an additional CHF 100 per month - Individual continuing education opportunities - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG grants its employees a 20% discount - Attractive company pension fund - On-site sports courses and numerous company events - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform - 5 weeks of vacation and possibility of buying up to 2 weeks ## Contact Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites on three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical clients to an industrial level and manufacture safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today able to ensure the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished galenic forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Aspettatevi di crescere", personalmente e professionalmente: presso Siegfried, offriamo sfide affascinanti e numerose opportunitÃ  per mettere in evidenza le vostre competenze. Come partner di fiducia e rispettato dell'industria farmaceutica, rispettiamo gli standard piÃđ alti in termini di sicurezza, qualitÃ  e sostenibilitÃ , mentre coltiviamo una cultura che vi consente di fiorire. Unitevi a un'azienda globale in piena espansione, dove diverse prospettive e esperienze si incontrano in un ambiente collaborativo. Qui, troverete un luogo di lavoro che valorizza tanto il successo collettivo che le vostre contribuzioni individualiâoffrendo opportunitÃ  a lungo termine per evolversi e avere un impatto. ## Mansioni - Nell'ambito dell'implementazione di nuovi processi di produzione di principi attivi farmaceutici, eseguite, all'interno dell'equipe di laboranti, le analisi chimiche degli esperimenti di laboratorio necessarie per la messa a punto di un processo di produzione ottimizzato per la fabbrica. - Conformemente ai requisiti GMP, partecipate attivamente alle validazioni/trasferimenti analitici. - Siete anche responsabili degli esperimenti di laboratorio eseguiti nel quadro di indagini conseguenti a problemi di non conformitÃ  delle cariche alla fabbrica. Durante questi troubleshooting, siete in grado di fornire ipotesi e soluzioni in collaborazione con i chimici di produzione, R&D e DA. Stabilite e gestite i documenti relativi agli esperimenti e alle analisi (giornali di laboratorio, file analisi/esperimento, rapporti). - Infine, partecipate anche alla manutenzione degli strumenti analitici nonchÃĐ alla logistica del laboratorio. Tutte queste attivitÃ  devono essere eseguite nel rigoroso rispetto delle prescrizioni HSE e QualitÃ . ##
âĒ Requisiti - Possedete una formazione di laborantina/e in chimica (CFC) o diploma superiore con un'esperienza di diversi anni in chimica analitica - Maitrezzate gli strumenti informatici classici come il pacchetto Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook). - Siete in grado di fornire un lavoro rigoroso in modo autonomo. - Vigilate in modo efficace sul rispetto delle esigenze di qualitÃ , di sicurezza e di ambiente. - Buon spirito di squadra ##
âĒ Cosa offriamo - Parcheggio gratuito - Assicurazioni malattia: fino al 10% di sconto sulle assicurazioni complementari presso i nostri partner - Piano di acquisto di azioni generoso e personalizzabile - Assegno per bambini: Siegfried AG aumenta l'assegno legale cantonale del 10% e versa in piÃđ CHF 100 al mese - OpportunitÃ  di formazione continua individuali - Buoni Reka: Siegfried AG concede ai suoi collaboratori uno sconto del 20% - Cassa di previdenza d'azienda attraente - Corsi di sport sul posto e numerosi eventi d'azienda - Accesso alla piattaforma di vantaggi collaboratori Swibeco - 5 settimane di ferie e possibilitÃ  di riscatto fino a 2 settimane ## Contatto Fondata nel 1873 a Zofingue, in Svizzera, Siegfried ÃĻ diventata un network globale di 13 siti distribuiti su tre continenti. Con un team di oltre 3 800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici a livello industriale e produciamo farmaci sicuri per i pazienti di tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrata, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche organizzazioni in grado oggi di garantire lo sviluppo e la produzione di principi attivi (API) e di forme galeniche fini sotto lo stesso tetto. Questa combinazione unica di competenze e esperienza rende di noi il partner piÃđ affidabile dell'industria farmaceutica. Siegfried ÃĻ una societÃ  leader nel settore CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, Svizzera. La societÃ  gestisce siti di produzione a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau) e Schlieren (Zurigo).
descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer fascinating challenges and numerous opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in terms of safety, quality, and sustainability, while cultivating a culture that allows you to flourish. Join a global company in full expansion, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you will find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to evolve and make an impact. ##
âĒ Responsibilities - In the context of implementing new manufacturing processes for pharmaceutical active ingredients, you will perform, as part of the laboratory team, the necessary chemical analyses of laboratory experiments to set up an optimized manufacturing process for the factory. - In accordance with GMP requirements, you will actively participate in analytical validations/transfers. - You will also be responsible for laboratory experiments conducted in the context of investigations following non-conformity issues at the factory. During these troubleshooting, you will be able to provide hypotheses and solutions in collaboration with production chemists, R&D, and DA. You will establish and manage documents related to experiments and analyses (lab journals, analysis/experiment files, reports). - Finally, you will participate in the maintenance of analytical equipment as well as laboratory logistics. All these activities must be carried out in strict compliance with HSE and Quality guidelines. ##
âĒ Requirements - You hold a laboratory technician training in chemistry (CFC) or a higher diploma with several years of experience in analytical chemistry - You master classic computer tools such as the Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, Outlook). - You are able to provide rigorous work in an autonomous manner. - You effectively monitor the respect of quality, safety, and environmental requirements. - Good team spirit ##
âĒ What we offer - Free parking - Health insurance: up to 10% discount on complementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable stock purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the cantonal legal allowance by 10% and pays an additional CHF 100 per month - Individual continuing education opportunities - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG grants its employees a 20% discount - Attractive company pension fund - On-site sports courses and numerous company events - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform - 5 weeks of vacation and possibility of redemption up to 2 weeks ## Contact Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spread across three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring our pharmaceutical clients' innovations to an industrial level and produce safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today able to guarantee the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished galenic forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

Descrizione "Expect to grow", personalmente e professionalmente: a Siegfried ci aspettiamo sfide interessanti e numerose opportunitÃ  per mettere in mostra le vostre doti. âĒ Cosa offriamo - Orari di lavoro flessibili che consentono di conciliare la famiglia, la vita privata e il lavoro - Con il tuo auto o senza - ti giova: o parcheggio agevolato o CHF 60.â di contributo alla mobilitÃ  al mese - Assicurazioni sanitarie: sconti fino al 10% sulle assicurazioni supplementari presso i nostri partner - Piano di acquisto di azioni ÃĻ generoso e personalizzabile - IndennitÃ  per figli: Siegfried AG aumenta l'indennitÃ  per figli del 10% rispetto al tasso legale cantonale - OpportunitÃ  di formazione individuale dopo accordo - Pausa di mezzogiorno retribuita, il benessere dei nostri dipendenti ÃĻ importante per noi - Reka-Geld: Siegfried AG concede ai dipendenti un 20% di sconto - Cassa di previdenza: la nostra cassa di previdenza ÃĻ attraente e i contributi sono personalizzabili - Ristorante personale / caffetteria: pasti a condizioni di favore - Posizione centrale: vicino alla stazione ferroviaria con una buona connessione al trasporto pubblico - Accesso a benefici e vantaggi esclusivi per i nostri dipendenti ## Contatto Siegfried ÃĻ una societÃ  di sviluppo e produzione farmaceutica (CDMO) con sede a Zofingen, Svizzera. descriptionByLocale.en:
About the role "Expect to grow" â personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer exciting challenges and numerous opportunities to showcase your skills. As a reliable and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we maintain the highest standards in security, quality, and sustainability â and foster a culture that helps you succeed. Join a rapidly growing, global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Youâll find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributions â and offers long-term opportunities to grow and make a difference. ## Key responsibilities - Leads the security officer team (6 employees) and ensures seamless 24/7 service - May be deployed as a security officer at the Zofingen pharmaceutical site, working day or night shifts - Acts as the operations manager in the initial phase of an event - Plans, documents, and executes maintenance and adjustments of safety systems at the Zofingen pharmaceutical site (e.g., fire hydrants, filtration masks, first aid kits, handheld extinguishers, etc.) - Coordinates external maintenance for fire prevention systems (BMA, GMA, sprinklers, etc.) in coordination with the fire prevention officer - Trains employees in workplace safety and alarm procedures - Ensures controlled access to the Zofingen pharmaceutical site and covers the alarm station 365 days a year, 24 hours a day - Manages the storage of chemotherapy at the Zofingen site and ensures maintenance of technical equipment and support for the rescue teamâs vehicles - Manages the storage of chemotherapy at the Zofingen site and ensures maintenance of technical equipment and support for the rescue teamâs vehicles ##
âĒ Requirements - Experience in a similar role within the chemical or pharmaceutical industry - Degree in a technical field with several years of relevant work experience - Certified emergency responder with experience in emergency situations (completion of EK Officer, EK-EinsatzfÃžhrung 1, or equivalent) - Proven leadership experience as a security officer - Strong proficiency in German. Knowledge of English is an advantage ##
âĒ What we offer - Flexible working hours to help balance family, private life, and work - Parking benefits or a CHF 60.â monthly mobility allowance â whether you commute by car or not - Health insurance: discounts of up to 10% on supplementary insurance through our partners - Generous and customizable employee share purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the child allowance by 10% above the legal cantonal rate - Individual training opportunities upon agreement - Paid lunch break â your well-being is important to us - Reka money: Siegfried AG grants employees a 20% discount - Pension fund: our pension fund is attractive, and contributions are customizable - In-house restaurant/cafeteria: meals at favorable conditions - Central location: close to the train station with good public transport connections - Access to exclusive employee benefits and perks ## Contact Siegfried is a pharmaceutical development and manufacturing company (CDMO) based in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates production sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

jobs.title: Site HR Head
jobs.description:
"Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer exciting challenges and ample opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner to the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality and sustainability, while fostering a culture that empowers you to thrive. Join a rapidly expanding global company, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you'll find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to grow and make an impact.
 
 
 
 Your Role: 
At Siegfried we are currently looking for a Site HR Head to join our team in our site based in Evionnaz.
The Site HR Head is the senior HR leader accountable for end to end HR leadership at site level, in line with the global HR Target Operating Model.

At site level, the role translates global people strategy into a robust site HR roadmap, enabling business performance, operational excellence, workforce readiness, and full regulatory compliance.

Responsibilities at site level:

1.Site HR Leadership & Business Partnering

âĒ Define and execute the Site HR Roadmap, aligned with global HR strategy and operational priorities. 
âĒ Act as trusted advisor to the Site Leadership Team, driving performance, leadership effectiveness, and organizational health. 
âĒ Lead change, transformation, and cultural initiatives, supporting site evolution and business continuity. 
âĒ Ensure HR business continuity, crisis preparedness, and workforce risk mitigation. 
âĒ Manage site HR budget and drive process efficiency and OPEX optimization. 
âĒ Contribute to global HR initiatives and projects, representing site perspectives.

2. Employee Relations, Compliance & Governance (SITE)

âĒ Own employee relations and labor law compliance, including investigations, grievances, and dispute resolution. 
âĒ Lead engagement with social partners / employee representatives, where applicable. 
âĒ Represent the company in internal and external audits. 
âĒ Partner closely with Legal and Communications on sensitive cases. 
âĒ Own integrity, speak up, and ethics topics at site and country level. 
âĒ Ensure consistent application of policies, internal controls, and regulatory requirements.

3. Talent, Leadership & Engagement (Site Execution)

âĒ Lead strategic workforce planning aligned to site capacity, capability, and future needs. 
âĒ Oversee recruitment for critical roles and talent attraction at site level. 
âĒ Drive performance management, leadership development, and succession planning (in alignment with global frameworks). 
âĒ Own onboarding quality, employee development focus, and engagement initiatives. 
âĒ Execute learning & development activities (non GxP) at site level. 
âĒ Coordinate international assignments (site execution). 
âĒ Support internal communications and employer branding at site level.

4. Payroll & Benefits (Site Governance)

âĒ Ensure accurate and compliant payroll and benefits administration (delivered via People Hub where applicable). 
âĒ Partner with Total Rewards to ensure competitive and compliant compensation practices. 
âĒ Oversee time & attendance, absenteeism, HR master data quality, and HR administration governance. 
âĒ Act as data steward, enabling reliable HR reporting and analytics.

5. Reporting, Analytics & KPIs

âĒ Ensure timely, accurate site HR reporting. 
âĒ Drive data based decision making using defined HR KPIs. 
âĒ Monitor trends related to retention, engagement, performance, and workforce risk.

Key Performance Indicators:

âĒ Delivery of Site HR Roadmap (quality, time, cost)
âĒ Compliance with labor laws, policies, and controls
âĒ Employee engagement and leadership effectiveness
âĒ Retention of critical roles
âĒ Effectiveness of performance management 
 Your Profile: 
 
 What are we looking for? 
 
 Education: 

- Bachelor's in law, Labor Relations, Psychology, HR Management or related field
- Master's or Postgraduate qualification in Human Resources preferred
 
 Experience: 

- 10+ years of HR leadership experience in a multinational environment (pharmaceutical manufacturing preferred)
- Proven experience leading HR at site level
- Experience in multi-site or matrix environments
 
 Languages: 

- Fluent in French and English
 
 Competencies: 

- Strategic thinking with strong business acumen
- Proven ability to influence and drive change
- Strong labor relations expertise
- Change leadership and communication skills
- High integrity, cultural awareness and interpersonal skills
 
 Your Benefits: 
 â
 What do we offer? 
 
 - Free parking
 
 - Health insurance: Up to 10% discount on supplemental insurance plans through our partners
 
 - Generous and customizable stock purchase plan
 
 - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the statutory cantonal allowance by 10% and pays an additional CHF 100 per month
 
 - Individual continuing education opportunities
 
 - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG offers its employees a 20% discount
 
 - Attractive company pension plan
 
 - On-site fitness classes and numerous company events
 
 - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform
 
 - 5 weeks of vacation and the option to buy back up to 2 weeks
 
 
 If youâre excited by the idea of joining our group , weâd love to hear from you.
 Apply today and be part of building something extraordinary! 
 
 
 Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network of 13 sites across three continents. With a team of more than 3,800 highly skilled professionals, we take the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers to industrial scale and manufacture safe drugs for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today that can carry out the development and manufacturing of APIs and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trusted partner in the pharmaceutical industry.

Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.it:

In qualitÃ  di partner affidabile e rispettato per l'industria farmaceutica, sosteniamo i piÃđ elevati standard di sicurezza, qualitÃ  e sostenibilitÃ , promuovendo al contempo una cultura che ti consente di prosperare. A livello del sito, il ruolo traduce la strategia delle persone globali in una robusta roadmap del sito HR, consentendo prestazioni aziendali, eccellenza operativa, disponibilitÃ  della forza lavoro e piena conformitÃ  normativa. ResponsabilitÃ  a livello del sito: 1.Site HR Leadership & Business Partnering

âĒ Cambiamento di piombo, trasformazione e iniziative culturali, sostenendo l'evoluzione del sito e la continuitÃ  aziendale.
âĒ Assicurare continuitÃ  aziendale HR, preparazione alla crisi e mitigazione del rischio di forza lavoro.
âĒ Gestione del budget del sito HR e dell'efficienza del processo di azionamento e ottimizzazione OPEX.
âĒ Contribuire a iniziative e progetti HR globali, che rappresentano le prospettive del sito. 2. Rapporti dei dipendenti, conformitÃ  e governance (SITE)
âĒ Possedere relazioni dei dipendenti e conformitÃ  del diritto del lavoro, comprese le indagini, le controversie e la risoluzione delle controversie.
âĒ Lead engagement con partner sociali / rappresentanti dei dipendenti, ove applicabile.
âĒ Rappresentare la societÃ  in audit interni ed esterni.
âĒ Collaborare a stretto contatto con Legale e Comunicazioni sui casi sensibili.
âĒ IntegritÃ, parlare e temi etici a livello di luogo e paese.
âĒ Assicurare l'applicazione coerente di politiche, controlli interni e requisiti normativi. 3. Talent, Leadership & Engagement (Site Execution)
âĒ Guidare la pianificazione strategica della forza lavoro allineato alle capacitÃ  del sito, alle capacitÃ  e alle esigenze future.
âĒ Superare il reclutamento per ruoli critici e attrattiva del talento a livello del sito.
âĒ Guidare la gestione delle prestazioni, lo sviluppo della leadership e la pianificazione della successione (in allineamento con i quadri globali).
âĒ Proprio onboarding qualitÃ , focus sviluppo dei dipendenti, e iniziative di impegno.
âĒ Eseguire attivitÃ  di apprendimento e sviluppo (non GxP) a livello del sito.
âĒ Coordinare incarichi internazionali (esecuzione del sito).
âĒ Sostenere le comunicazioni interne e il marchio del datore di lavoro a livello del sito. 4. Payroll & Benefits (Site Governance)
âĒ Assicurare la gestione accurata e conforme del libro paga e dei benefici (consegnato tramite People Hub ove applicabile).
âĒ Partner di Total Rewards per garantire pratiche di compensazione competitive e conformi.
âĒ Controllare il tempo e la frequenza, l'assenteismo, la qualitÃ  dei dati master HR e la governance dell'amministrazione delle risorse umane.
âĒ Agire come amministratore di dati, consentendo report e analisi affidabili delle risorse umane. 5. Reporting, Analytics & KPIs
âĒ Assicurare la reportistica HR del sito tempestiva e accurata.
âĒ Guidare il processo decisionale basato sui dati utilizzando i KPI HR definiti.
âĒ Monitorare le tendenze relative al rischio di ritenzione, impegno, prestazioni e forza lavoro. Indicatori di performance chiave:
âĒ Consegna del sito HR Roadmap (qualitÃ , tempo, costo)
âĒ conformitÃ  con le leggi, le politiche e i controlli
âĒ Impegno dei dipendenti e l'efficacia della leadership
âĒ Conservazione dei ruoli critici
âĒ Efficienza della gestione delle prestazioni Il tuo profilo: Cosa stiamo cercando? Istruzione: - Bachelor's in law, Labor Relations, Psicologia, HR Management o relativo campo - Masters o Postgraduate in Risorse Umane ha preferito Esperienza: - 10+ anni di esperienza di leadership HR in un ambiente multinazionale (preferito dalla produzione farmaceutica) - Esperienza comprovata leader HR a livello del sito - Esperienza in ambienti multi-sito o matrice Lingue: - Conoscenza del lavoro francese e inglese Competencies: - - Parcheggio gratuito - Assicurazione sanitaria: Fino al 10% di sconto sui piani assicurativi complementari attraverso i nostri partner - Piano d'acquisto azionario generoso e personalizzabile - IndennitÃ  per bambini: Siegfried AG aumenta l'indennitÃ  cantonale legale del 10% e paga un ulteriore CHF 100 al mese - OpportunitÃ  di formazione continua individuale - Prestazioni per dipendenti Reka: Siegfried AG offre ai propri dipendenti uno sconto del 20% - Piano pensionistico aziendale attraente - Piattaforma di fitness in loco e numerosi eventi aziendali Se siete entusiasti dell'idea di unire il nostro gruppo, ci piacerebbe sentire da voi. Applicare oggi e far parte di costruire qualcosa di straordinario! Fondata nel 1873 a Zofingen, Svizzera, Siegfried ÃĻ cresciuta in una rete globale di 13 siti in tre continenti. Con un team di oltre 3.800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici a scala industriale e produciamo farmaci sicuri per i pazienti in tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche organizzazioni oggi in grado di effettuare lo sviluppo e la produzione di API e forme di dosaggio finito sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile nel settore farmaceutico. Siegfried ÃĻ un CDMO leader (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. L'azienda gestisce stabilimenti produttivi a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), e Schlieren (Zurich).

Apply today and be part of building something extraordinary! Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network of 13 sites across three continents. With a team of more than 3,800 highly skilled professionals, we take the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers to industrial scale and manufacture safe drugs for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today that can carry out the development and manufacturing of APIs and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trusted partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione "Expect to grow" personally and professionally: At Siegfried you will find exciting challenges and numerous ways to prove your talents. Become part of a rapidly growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a cooperative environment. Here you will find a job that evaluates both collective success and your individual contributions â and offers you long-term opportunities to develop and do something. ## Mansioni An exciting mix of administrative, coordination and organizational tasks awaits you in this varied function. As a central contact person, you provide smooth workflows in everyday work and support the employees of the Analytics department in daily business. jobs.description:
"Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer exciting challenges and ample opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner to the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality and sustainability, while fostering a culture that empowers you to thrive. Join a rapidly expanding global company, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you'll find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to grow and make an impact.
 
 
 
 Your Role: 
In this newly created role, you will lead the global Drug Product (DP) Development organization and further strengthen Siegfriedâs pharmaceutical development capabilities. You will drive the advancement of Siegfriedâs DP technologies and development project performance across all clinical phases.

You will ensure best-in-class pharmaceutical R&D processes covering multiple dosage forms, including oral solid dosage forms, parenterals, inhalables, and ophthalmics. The role includes evaluating new customer development requests for formulation and process development, overseeing execution of development programs, and ensuring successful transfer to GMP manufacturing.

In addition, you will build and expand the organizationâs capabilities by attracting, developing, and mentoring top DP development talent across sites. 
 Your Profile: 
 In that role, you will
 
âĒ Lead and manage the global Drug Product Development & Technologies function , with oversight of pharmaceutical development, characterization capabilities, and development project execution from preclinical development through Phase III and commercialization .

âĒ Lead the inquiry-to-offer process for new client development requests, ensuring high-quality, scientifically robust and competitive development proposals through strong technological evaluation and efficient decision making.

âĒ Oversee the multi-site execution of Siegfriedâs global development project portfolio , ensuring scientific excellence, timely execution, and strong customer outcomes.

âĒ Monitor scientific and technology trends to identify emerging formulation technologies, services, and development opportunities.

âĒ Strengthen Siegfriedâs reputation as a leading Drug Product Development partner for pharmaceutical and biotech clients.

âĒ Develop and maintain global DP technology roadmaps across development phases, sites, and dosage forms.

âĒ Collaborate closely with key internal stakeholders including Business Development & Sales, manufacturing sites, and other global functions .

âĒ Build, mentor, and develop a high-performing global team , attracting and nurturing top scientific talent.
 
 Technical profile 
 
âĒ Pharmacist or equivalent scientific background; PhD in Pharmaceutical Technology preferred 

âĒ Deep expertise in oral solid dosage form (OSD) and parenteral development is essential , including experience with complex formulations (e.g., BCS Class II/III compounds, amorphous solid dispersions)

âĒ Proven track record of advancing OSD and/or parenteral programs from early development through clinical phases to commercialization 

âĒ Strong understanding of analytical characterization and CMC development for OSD and parenteral dosage forms

âĒ Working knowledge and/or strategic oversight of additional dosage forms (e.g., inhalation, ophthalmic) is advantageous

âĒ Deep expertise in CMC development , preferably within Drug Product Development

âĒ With demonstrated track record advancing development programs from early research through clinical development and product launch 

âĒ Experience contributing to or generating Drug Product intellectual property 

âĒ Strong academic network and experience with public-private collaborations 
 
 Leadership profile: 
 
âĒ Proven ability to build and lead global teams across multiple sites 

âĒ Strong cross-cultural leadership and global mindset 

âĒ Experience working effectively in complex matrix organizations 

âĒ Ability to influence stakeholders in multi-site environments with indirect reporting structures 
 
 Your Benefits: 
 At Siegfried, youâll find more than just a job â youâll discover a place where your impact matters, your growth is encouraged, and your wellbeing is supported. 
 
 Professional Growth & Impact 
 - You'll find a dynamic, international environment with room to take ownership and make a long term sustainable impact. 
 - You'll be able to build and shape the function
- Through your impact and Individual development solutions you'll grow personally and professionally at a fast pace.
- You'll collaborate with an experienced, passionate teams that values excellence, quality and continuous learning. 
 
 Attractive Compensation & Incentives 
 - Short-term incentive programs recognizing both performance and contribution 
 - Long-term incentive plan focused on sustained value creation 
 
 Flexibility & Wellbeing 
 - Flexible working hours and hybrid work options. 
 - Comprehensive accident and health insurance coverage. 
 - Active health management and discounted fitness memberships. 
 
 
 Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network of 13 sites across three continents. With a team of more than 3,800 highly skilled professionals, we take the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers to industrial scale and manufacture safe drugs for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today that can carry out the development and manufacturing of APIs and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trusted partner in the pharmaceutical industry.

Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

Il vostro profilo: In questo ruolo, sarete in grado di guidare e gestire la funzione globale di sviluppo e tecnologie del prodotto della droga, con la supervisione dello sviluppo farmaceutico, delle capacitÃ  di caratterizzazione e dell'esecuzione del progetto di sviluppo da uno sviluppo preclinico attraverso la fase III e la commercializzazione.
âĒ Superare l'esecuzione multi-sito del portafoglio di progetti di sviluppo globale di Siegfried , assicurando l'eccellenza scientifica, l'esecuzione tempestiva e forti risultati dei clienti.
âĒ Monitorare le tendenze scientifiche e tecnologiche per identificare le tecnologie di formulazione emergenti, i servizi e le opportunitÃ  di sviluppo.
âĒ Rafforzare la reputazione di Siegfried come partner leader per lo sviluppo di prodotti farmaceutici e biotecnologie.
âĒ Sviluppare e mantenere le roadmap tecnologiche DP globali in fasi di sviluppo, siti e forme di dosaggio.
âĒ Collaborare a stretto contatto con le principali parti interessate interne, tra cui Business Development & Sales, siti di produzione e altre funzioni globali.
âĒ Costruire, mentore e sviluppare un team globale altamente performante, attrarre e nutrire i migliori talenti scientifici.
âĒ Forme di sviluppo professionale e di sviluppo professionale A Siegfried, troverete piÃđ di un lavoro â scoprirete un luogo dove il vostro impatto conta, la vostra crescita ÃĻ incoraggiata, e il vostro benessere ÃĻ supportato. Crescita e impatto professionale - Troverete un ambiente dinamico e internazionale con spazio per prendere la proprietÃ  e fare un impatto sostenibile a lungo termine. - No. Sarete in grado di costruire e modellare la funzione - Attraverso le vostre soluzioni di impatto e sviluppo individuale crescerete personalmente e professionalmente ad un ritmo veloce. - No. Collaborerai con team esperti e appassionati che valorizzano l'eccellenza, la qualitÃ  e l'apprendimento continuo. Compensazione e Incentivi attraenti - Programmi di incentivazione a breve termine che riconoscono prestazioni e contributo - Piano di incentivazione a lungo termine focalizzato sulla creazione di valore sostenibile FlessibilitÃ  & Benessere - Ore lavorative flessibili e opzioni di lavoro ibride. - Copertura completa degli infortuni e dell'assicurazione sanitaria. - Gestione della salute attiva e appartenenza al fitness scontato. Fondata nel 1873 a Zofingen, Svizzera, Siegfried ÃĻ cresciuta in una rete globale di 13 siti in tre continenti. Con un team di oltre 3.800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici a scala industriale e produciamo farmaci sicuri per i pazienti in tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche organizzazioni oggi in grado di effettuare lo sviluppo e la produzione di API e forme di dosaggio finito sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile nel settore farmaceutico. Siegfried ÃĻ un CDMO leader (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. L'azienda gestisce stabilimenti produttivi a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), e Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.it:

Qui troverete un posto di lavoro che valorizza il successo collettivo tanto quanto i vostri contributi individuali, offrendo opportunitÃ  a lungo termine per evolversi e avere un impatto. Il vostro ruolo: stiamo cercando un coordinatore di emergenza per il nostro sito di industria farmaceutica. Si svolgerÃ  un ruolo centrale nella preparazione, coordinamento e miglioramento continuo dei dispositivi di risposta di emergenza, in stretta connessione con i team interni, sollievo esterno e gestione del sito.

âĒ Coordinamento della risposta di emergenza e gestione del sito

âĒ Con un team di oltre 3.800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici sulla scala industriale e produciamo farmaci sicuri per i pazienti di tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche organizzazioni in grado oggi di garantire lo sviluppo e la produzione di principi attivi (API) e forme galeniche finite sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile nel settore farmaceutico. Siegfried ÃĻ un CDMO leader (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. Gli operatori dell'azienda si trovano a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), e Schlieren (Zurich).
descriptionByLocale.en:
"Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer exciting challenges and many opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we meet the highest standards of safety, quality and sustainability, while cultivating a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here you will find a workplace that values collective success as much as your individual contributionsâgiving long-term opportunities to evolve and have an impact. Your Role: We are looking for an emergency co-ordinator for our pharmaceutical industry site. You will play a central role in the preparation, coordination and continuous improvement of emergency response devices, in close connection with internal teams, external relief and site management. Your main tasks:
âĒ Coordination of the emergency response and management of the site
âĒ Supervision of internal firefighters and the personal rescue system
âĒ Organization of regular exercises and management of emergency scenarios
âĒ Update of emergency plans, procedures and internal instructions
âĒ Monitoring of firefighting systems
âĒ Contributing on an ad hoc basis to other operational security activities, in particular in the event of the absence or leave of a colleague from HSE Your Profile:
âĒ Officer or non-commissioned firefighter, certified by the Swiss Federation of Firefighters
âĒ Experience in an industrial environment, ideally chemistry or pharma
âĒ Additional training in crisis management or desired industrial safety
âĒ Good communication, structured and field oriented
âĒ Easy to use with IT tools and technical documents
âĒ Required operational English level Your Benefits:
âĒ Free parking
âĒ Health insurance: up to 10% discount on supplementary insurance with our partners
âĒ Plan to purchase generous and customizable shares
âĒ Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the cantonal legal allowance by 10% and pays in addition CHF 100 per month
âĒ Individual continuing training opportunities
âĒ Reka Cheques: Siegfried AG grants employees a 20% discount
âĒ Attractive company pension fund
âĒ On-site sports courses and numerous business events
âĒ Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform
âĒ 5 weeks of vacation and buy-back option up to 2 weeks Founded in 1873 in Zofingue, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spread over three continents. With a team of more than 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers to the industrial scale and manufacture safe medicines for patients around the world. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations able today to ensure the development and production of active ingredients (APIs) and finished galenic forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operators manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.en:
"Expect to grow" personally and professionally: Siegfried awaits you with exciting challenges and numerous ways to prove your talents. As a trusted and respected partner of the pharmaceutical industry, we maintain the highest standards in the fields of safety, quality and sustainability â and at the same time promote a culture that empowers you to succeed. Become part of a rapidly growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a cooperative environment. Here you will find a job that evaluates both collective success and your individual contributions â and offers you long-term opportunities to develop and do something. Your Role: As an industrial engineer, you are the central technical contact for our production facilities and, together with internal and external partners, ensure smooth operation. They work on demanding technical projects and actively contribute to the continuous improvement of our systems. Your Profile: Your role
âĒ Technical contact for the assigned production facilities
âĒ Coordinating activities in plant failures together with production, maintenance, workshops and external service providers
âĒ Developing and implementing corrective and preventive maintenance measures
âĒ âĒ Management and implementation of technical projects taking into account current project management standards and GEP requirements
âĒ Monitoring of project costs, appointments and project accounting
âĒ Creating and maintaining plant documentation according to uniform standards Your profile skills
âĒ Complete technical basic training, e.g. Process engineering knowledge is desirable
âĒ Industry knowledge of chemistry, pharmaceuticals or related industries
âĒ Knowledge of chemical plant construction or experience with industrial production facilities are desirable Personal strengths
âĒ Team-oriented, communicative, open and authentic personality
âĒ Quiet, structured and reliable operation â even in hectic situations
âĒ Networked and solution-oriented thinking
âĒ High self-initiative, sense of responsibility and enforcement Your Benefits:
âĒ Flexible working hours allow the reconciliation of family, leisure and work
âĒ Whether by car or without â You benefit: either parked or CHF 60.â Mobility supplement per month
âĒ Health insurance: discounts up to 10% on additional insurance from our partners
âĒ âĒ Children's allowance: Siegfried AG increases the children's allowance by 10% compared to the cantonal legal approach
âĒ Individual training opportunities by agreement
âĒ Paid pause, the well-being of our employees is at our heart
âĒ Reka money: Siegfried AG grants the employees 20% discount
âĒ Pensions fund: Our company's pension fund is attractive and individual contributions With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers into industrial production and produce safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few companies that today can combine the development and production of active ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trustworthy partner of the pharmaceutical industry Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione "Aspetta di crescere" personalmente e professionalmente: A Siegfried troverete interessanti sfide e numerosi modi per dimostrare i vostri talenti. Come partner affidabile e rispettato dell'industria farmaceutica, manteniamo i piÃđ elevati standard nei settori della sicurezza, della qualitÃ  e della sostenibilitÃ  â e allo stesso tempo promuoviamo una cultura che ti consente di avere successo. Diventa parte di un'azienda globale in rapida crescita dove prospettive e esperienze diverse si fondono in un ambiente cooperativo. Qui troverete un lavoro che valuta sia il successo collettivo che i vostri contributi individuali â e vi offre opportunitÃ  a lungo termine per sviluppare e fare qualcosa. Il tuo ruolo: In qualitÃ  di Senior Lab Technician Analytics, hai un ruolo chiave nei progetti di sviluppo analitico del nostro laboratorio, che si concentrano sugli ingredienti farmaceutici. Supportano il team in tutte le fasi di sviluppo, dal primo sviluppo al processo di maturitÃ . - Sviluppare la responsabilitÃ  per lo sviluppo analitico dei progetti dei clienti nel campo della sostanza delle droghe - dalla fase di sviluppo iniziale alla maturitÃ  di processo - sviluppo, ottimizzazione e risoluzione dei problemi dei metodi cromatografici (HPLC, UPLC, GC, GC-Headspace) - implementare, convalidare e trasferire metodi di analisi cromatografica - analizzando sostanze attive farmaceutiche e prodotti intermedi I vostri vantaggi: Al nostro sito a Zofingen, un team motivato e consolidato vi aspetta e compiti impegnativi in un ambiente in crescita. Ti aspetti che un datore di lavoro usi la tua esperienza in modo ottimale e allo stesso tempo si sviluppi personalmente? Allora hai ragione con noi. Siegfried ÃĻ un'azienda in cui l'innovazione ha tradizione e ci si puÃē aspettare di piÃđ nel senso del nostro slogan ÂŦaspetta di piÃđÂŧ. Lavorare a Siegfried - Ore lavorative flessibili permettono la riconciliazione della famiglia, del tempo libero e del lavoro - IndennitÃ  di mobilitÃ : Ti paghiamo ogni mese CHF 60.00 al tuo abbonamento ÃVV, parcheggio, bici, scooter e altro che sicuramente ti porterÃ  a noi - Assicurazione sanitaria: sconti fino al 10% su assicurazione aggiuntiva con i nostri partner per te e il tuo partner / famiglia Con un team di oltre 3.800 professionisti altamente qualificati, portiamo le innovazioni dei nostri clienti farmaceutici nella produzione industriale e produciamo farmaci sicuri per i pazienti in tutto il mondo. Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche aziende che oggi puÃē combinare lo sviluppo e la produzione di principi attivi (API) e forme di dosaggio finito sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile dell'industria farmaceutica Siegfried ÃĻ un CDMO leader (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. L'azienda gestisce stabilimenti produttivi a Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), e Schlieren (Zurich).
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione "Expect to grow" personally and professionally: Siegfried awaits you with exciting challenges and numerous ways to prove your talents. As a trusted and respected partner of the pharmaceutical industry, we maintain the highest standards in the fields of safety, quality and sustainability â and at the same time promote a culture that empowers you to succeed. Become part of a rapidly growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a cooperative environment. Here you will find a job that evaluates both collective success and your individual contributions â and offers you long-term opportunities to develop and do something. Your Role: As a Senior Lab Technician Analytics, you play a crucial role in the analytical development projects of our laboratory, which focus on drug active ingredients. They support the team in all stages of development, from early development to process maturity. - Responsibility for the analytical development of customer projects in the field of Drugs Substance â from the early development phase to process maturity - Developing, optimizing and troubleshooting chromatographic methods (HPLC, UPLC, GC, GC headspace) - Implement, validate and transfer chromatographic analysis methods - Analyze the pharmaceutical active substances and intermediates, partly cGMP-compliant - Support for maintenance and maintenance of our modern equipment park Your
âĒ Profile: Special Strengths - Professional experience in a similar function, good HPLC/GC knowledge and interest in chromatographic separation techniques - Training as a chemical laboratory in EFZ or comparable training with a focus on analysis - Experience with tools like Chromeleon, LIMS, MS Office, etc. - GMP is beneficial Personal strengths - Teamwork is important to you to develop processes together - You are proactive and like to take responsibility - They have an exact operation to deliver high quality results - Self-employed work and organization of project work makes you fun - Good knowledge of English is important Your Benefits At our site in Zofingen, a motivated team awaits you and challenging tasks in a growing environment. You expect an employer to use your expertise optimally and at the same time develop yourself personally? Then you're right with us. Siegfried is a company in which innovation has tradition and you can expect more in the sense of our slogan ÂŦexpect moreÂŧ. Work at Siegfried - Flexible working hours enable the reconciliation of family, leisure and work - Mobility grant: We will pay you CHF 60.00 per month to your ÃVV subscription, car rental, bike, scooter and anything else that will make you safe every day - Health insurance: Discounts up to 10% on additional insurance with our partners for you and your partner/family - Stock purchase plan is generous and individual - Family allowance: all eligible employees of children and/or training allowances receive a monthly family allowance - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases child allowance by 10% compared to the cantonal legal approach - Individual training opportunities by arrangement - Reka-Geld: Siegfried AG grants employees a 20% discount - Pension fund: Our company's pension fund is attractive and individual contributions - Personal restaurant / cafeteria: catering for preferential conditions - Central location: Near railway station location with very good access to public transport - Free credit card (Corner Card) for our employees - Language courses in German for interested employees About Siegfried Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network with 13 locations on three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers into industrial production and produce safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few companies that today can combine the development and production of active ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trustworthy partner of the pharmaceutical industry Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.en:
Description "Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer fascinating challenges and numerous opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we uphold the highest standards in safety, quality, and sustainability, while cultivating a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a global company in full expansion, where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here, you will find a workplace that values both collective success and your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to evolve and make an impact. ## Your Role As a maintenance technician specializing in electrical systems, you ensure the smooth operation of technical installations and guarantee safety and continuity of equipment. ### Your Main
âĒ Responsibilities - Perform preventive and corrective maintenance on electrical systems - Diagnose faults and intervene quickly in case of malfunction - Carry out repair, restoration, and commissioning work - Participate in the installation and commissioning of new equipment - Ensure compliance with safety standards and regulations - Prepare intervention reports and ensure a rigorous follow-up - Collaborate with internal teams and external suppliers ## Your
âĒ Profile - Electrician's diploma, automation, or equivalent training - Confirmed experience in a similar role (industrial maintenance or building maintenance) - Good knowledge of electricity, reading of diagrams, and fault diagnosis - Autonomy, rigor, and sense of responsibility - Analytical spirit and reactivity in the face of unexpected events - Good interpersonal skills and ability to work in a team ## Your Benefits - Flexible working hours allowing you to balance family life, hobbies, and profession - Free parking - Health insurance: up to 10% discount on complementary insurance with our partners - Generous and customizable stock purchase plan - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases the cantonal allowance by 10% and pays an additional CHF 100 per month - Opportunities for individual continuous training - Reka vouchers: Siegfried AG grants its employees a 20% discount - Attractive company pension fund - On-site sports courses and numerous company events - Access to the Swibeco employee benefits platform - 5 weeks of vacation and possibility of buying up to 2 weeks ## About Siegfried Founded in 1873 in Zofingue, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spread across three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical clients to an industrial level and produce safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations today able to ensure the development and production of active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and finished galenic forms under one roof. This unique combination of expertise and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading pharmaceutical development and manufacturing company (CDMO), with its headquarters in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates production sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

descriptionByLocale.en:
"Expect to grow" personally and professionally: Siegfried awaits you with exciting challenges and numerous ways to prove your talents. As a trusted and respected partner of the pharmaceutical industry, we maintain the highest standards in the fields of safety, quality and sustainability â and at the same time promote a culture that empowers you to succeed. Become part of a rapidly growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a cooperative environment. Here you will find a job that evaluates both collective success and your individual contributions â and offers you long-term opportunities to develop and do something. Your Role: This extremely responsible and varied function awaits you with an exciting mix of administrative, coordination and organizational tasks. As an important and central point of contact, they provide smooth workflows in everyday work and relieve and support comprehensive members of the management and senior management in daily business. - Administrative and organisational support of the assigned senior management and management members - Ensure comprehensive appointment coordination including calendar management - Organizing and booking business trips and customer visits - Prepare meeting documents, create presentations and run logs -
âĒ Responsibilities of freight billing and the expenses management - Organizing customer events and internal events - Leading internal process databases and cooperation in projects - Interface function as the first point of contact for internal and external partners - General correspondence in German and English - Troubleshooting in Daily Business Your
âĒ Profile: Expertise - Multiannual experience in C-level support in an international company - Successfully completed commercial training or comparable qualification, ideally with further training in the field of Executive Assistance (e.g. - Very good, stylistic knowledge of German and English in word and writing, French or Spanish - IT-affin and very versed in handling the most common MS-Office programs Personal strengths - Service-oriented, proactive personality with high self-initiative - Networks thinking, communication-strong team player with a good flair for dealing with different personalities - Flexible organizational design with solution-oriented operation Your Benefits - Pension fund: Our company's pension fund is attractive and individual contributions - Stock purchase plan is generous and individual - Child allowance: Siegfried AG increases child allowance by 10% compared to the cantonal legal approach - Reka-Geld: Siegfried AG grants employees a 20% discount - Personal restaurant / cafeteria: catering for preferential conditions - You can park with us - Central location: Near railway station location with very good access to public transport Founded in 1873 in Zofingen, Switzerland, Siegfried has grown into a global network with 13 locations on three continents. With a team of over 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers into industrial production and produce safe medicines for patients worldwide. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few companies that today can combine the development and production of active ingredients (APIs) and finished dosage forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most trustworthy partner of the pharmaceutical industry Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operates manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).

Come CDMO completamente integrato, Siegfried ÃĻ una delle poche organizzazioni in grado oggi di garantire lo sviluppo e la produzione di principi attivi (API) e forme galeniche finite sotto un unico tetto. Questa combinazione unica di know-how ed esperienza ci rende il partner piÃđ affidabile nel settore farmaceutico. Siegfried ÃĻ un CDMO leader (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) con sede a Zofingen, in Svizzera. descriptionByLocale.en:
"Expect to grow", personally and professionally: At Siegfried, we offer exciting challenges and many opportunities to showcase your talents. As a trusted and respected partner in the pharmaceutical industry, we meet the highest standards of safety, quality and sustainability, while cultivating a culture that allows you to thrive. Join a growing global company where diverse perspectives and experiences come together in a collaborative environment. Here you will find a workplace that values collective success as much as your individual contributionsâoffering long-term opportunities to evolve and have an impact. Your Role:
âĒ Receiving raw materials: Load and unload the internal truck. Load and unload trucks of raw materials by checking the conformity of arrivals.
âĒ Participate in plant supply: Deliver solid loads to different plants. Deliver liquid raw materials to different plants.
âĒ Prepare details for production: Prepare solid raw materials according to load sheets.
âĒ Contribute to inventories.
âĒ Ensure order and cleanliness of shops.
âĒ Respect and enforce HSE requirements, quality, costs and deadlines. Your Profile:
âĒ Manager SWC in logistics or equivalent training.
âĒ Minimum 2 years of experience in an industrial environment.
âĒ Essential carist permit. Your Benefits: N/A Founded in 1873 in Zofingue, Switzerland, Siegfried has become a global network of 13 sites spread over three continents. With a team of more than 3,800 highly qualified professionals, we bring the innovations of our pharmaceutical customers to the industrial scale and manufacture safe medicines for patients around the world. As a fully integrated CDMO, Siegfried is one of the few organizations able today to ensure the development and production of active ingredients (APIs) and finished galenic forms under one roof. This unique combination of know-how and experience makes us the most reliable partner in the pharmaceutical industry. Siegfried is a leading CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) headquartered in Zofingen, Switzerland. The company operators manufacturing sites in Evionnaz (Valais), Zofingen (Aargau), and Schlieren (Zurich).
